data.content: Plan review requested revisions. The current plan correctly identifies the UI split between Stage and Retake Now, but it does not fully match the required queued-screen Take! behavior. In the existing implementation, Take! reopens an already-running session for the beat and blocks launch when an ancestor is already rolling. The revised plan should explicitly account for those guardrails and explain where that logic will live so RetakesView does not drift from beats/page.tsx behavior. The test plan should add coverage for stage-only, retake-now success, existing-running-session reuse, rolling-ancestor blocking, and session-start failure after the state update succeeds.
